description: NPC dialogue registry — voice lines, trigger zones, and narrative metadata for MinPlayableMap

Elder_Tracker.role: Tribal elder and master tracker — primary narrative guide
Elder_Tracker.personality: Pragmatic, weathered, speaks in observations not opinions. Never wastes words.
Elder_Tracker.voice_style: Low, measured, gravelly. Pauses between sentences. Never raises voice.

Scout_Kael.role: Young tribal scout — danger warning system and world information
Scout_Kael.personality: Alert, fast-talking under stress, precise about facts. Respects the elder.
Scout_Kael.voice_style: Urgent, clipped sentences when reporting danger. Calmer when safe.

dialogue_lines.text: Stay low. The T-Rex hunts by movement — if you freeze, it loses you. But the raptors... they remember. They will circle back. Your only chance is the river crossing — they hate deep water.

This is where my father's father made his first kill. A young Stegosaurus, separated from the herd. He tracked it for two days. He said the land itself guided him — the bent grass, the disturbed mud, the silence of birds. Learn to read these signs, and the valley will feed you. Ignore them, and the valley will feed on you.

We found their kill site — three adults, taken in one night. Something is hunting in packs now. Something we have never seen before. We move camp at first light. Anyone who stays behind stays forever.

The river is both road and wall. Predators avoid deep crossings — use that. But the current is strongest at midday when snowmelt peaks. Cross at dawn or dusk. And watch the far bank before you step in — a crocodile waits where the water slows.

narrative_triggers.label: NarrTrigger_KillSite_001
narrative_triggers.description: Ancient kill site with scattered bones — triggers elder lore about tracking

narrative_triggers.label: NarrTrigger_RiverCross_001
narrative_triggers.description: River crossing point — triggers survival advice about water crossing

priority_audio_tasks.task: Integrate voice lines into MetaSounds dialogue system
priority_audio_tasks.notes: Voice lines should duck ambient audio by -12dB during playback. Fade in 0.3s, fade out 0.5s.
Bone creak, distant wind, low predator growl at distance. No music — pure environmental tension.

priority_audio_tasks.task: Add river ambient audio to NarrTrigger_RiverCross_001
priority_audio_tasks.notes: Fast-moving water, occasional splash, bird calls. Volume increases as player approaches.
